role: Create or update tests, run smoke locally, interpret failures, propose fixes
summary: Full CLI suite green including 11 new handoff tests: happy path, artifact content, manifest advance, out-of-order/repeat/unknown/missing-agent failures, full-chain completion, validator pass on completed chain, handoff-on-completed failure, and validator negative (missing output artifact detected). Negative test initially exposed the no-op validator bug; after the em-dash fix the suite passes end to end.
